rule: canonicalizing an element subtree by Id under Exclusive C14N renders only the namespaces visibly utilized within the subtree (xmlns:a), pruning the unused inherited xmlns:b
provenance: derived from W3C Exclusive XML Canonicalization 1.0 REC (xml-exc-c14n-20020718) §2 rule applied to an apex subtree (the XMLDSig SignedInfo/SignedProperties case); expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
